title: Ember & Ash
description: A magic mod revolving around scrolls and spell-books... Are you ready to become the greatest magician?
body:
![Ember & Ash Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/249d9091c35d4f49e6380ebed9d8bc830bf95ca9.png)

# Ember & Ash

This is Ember & Ash, a small magic mod that i've been working on. It revolves around silver and magical tomes. Every magic item uses mana, which is visible in a bar on the main hud.

![Mana Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c7f178ef27464de5f42f091478568be1808a9ec_0.webp)

## How to Play

### Crafting
You need the "Inscribing Table" in order to make the scrolls/tomes in survival mode. There is a recipe button when you open its menu that lets you view the various recipes.

![Inscribing Table Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be351d428f9370e0045bbbfc3f9890b6fcbc525b.png)

### Progression
It depends on what class you go with, but this is the mage's progression.

- Get silver
- Make 2 empty spell tomes
- Make Inscriber
- Make water bucket
- Make Tome of Splashing
- Go to the nether
- Get blaze powder
- Make Tome of Flames
- Make lightning rod
- Make Tome of Plasma
- Get TNT
- Make Tome of Explosions
- Go to the end
- Beat Ender Dragon with Tome of Explosions or Regular weapons
- Get Enderite
- Find End Temple
- Fight Ender Cultist
- Farm Ender Cultist until Tome of the Cultists drops
- Find End City
- Farm shulkers to get shulker shells
- Craft shulker powder
- Make ender core
- Make Advanced Empty Spell Book
- Make Wrath of Zeus
- Get Radiant Gems
- Make Tome of Radiance

**_The progression isn't really finished yet, and I plan to add more bosses and items to get!_**

## Misc

**PLAYING WITH MODS LIKE REI, JADE, AND XAERO'S MINIMAP IS RECOMMENDED**

_This mod is still in the early stage of alpha, so expect bugs. If you have any you can join my discord and let me know in the, "🪲︱report-bugs" channel._
